component_mapping.header.titleLines: Large stacked title rendered directly on background
component_mapping.tracks[].rank: Number badge in each trapezoid tier
component_mapping.tracks[].title: Tier headline
component_mapping.tracks[].accent: Number badge color and right-side card highlight

render_rules: Do not render an outer frame behind the title area.
Keep exactly five tiers unless tierLayout is redesigned in the Remotion component.
Keep each keyword short; long keywords should be split or reduced to avoid overflow.
Use high-contrast card text because the template is meant for mobile viewing.
Default preview is silent unless audio is explicitly added.
